overview.intro: KINETIC_MONOLITH IS A RADICAL REIMAGINING OF STATIC INFRASTRUCTURE. IT FUNCTIONS AS A RESPONSIVE GEOMETRY THAT ADAPTS TO ENVIRONMENTAL STIMULI IN REAL-TIME.
overview.body: The structure utilizes a modular framework of reinforced carbon-polymer panels, allowing for fluid transformation of its external envelope. This is not merely a building; it is a living schematic of structural intent, designed to endure the harsh conditions of urban density while maintaining a singular, imposing aesthetic presence.
